ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "favorite_book" TEXT /* Favorite book of the user */,
  "favorite_author" TEXT /* Favorite author of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book genre */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book category */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book format */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "book_cover" TEXT /* Book cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES book_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES book_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES book_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_books" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-book relationship */,
  "note" TEXT /* Personal note about the book */,
  "date_read" TEXT /* Date the user finished reading the book */,
  "owned" INTEGER /* Whether the user owns the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Reading status (e.g., Want to read, Currently reading, Already read) */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started reading the book */,
  "finish_date" TEXT /* Date the user finished reading the book */,
  "num_pages_read" INTEGER /* Number of pages the user read */,
  "reading_goal" INTEGER /* User's reading goal in pages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_books_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date the friendship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the book format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the book genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the book category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_author" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-author relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_author_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_shelves" (
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book shelf */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "shelf_name" TEXT /* Name of the book shelf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_shelves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_shelf_books" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-shelf relationship */,
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book shelf */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_shelf_books_shelf_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelf_id") REFERENCES book_shelves ("shelf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_shelf_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
